confidence_rationale: The single strongest computational frame in the pull for schema invalidation. The latent-cause-inference model formalises invalidation as inference of a *new* latent cause underlying current observations rather than as erasure of an old one -- exactly the architectural form V_s requires. Bayesian formulation gives clean handles for graded vs threshold dynamics and for the per-anchor accumulator role. Highest mapping fidelity in the pull because the construct *is* the architectural construct.
failure_signatures: Restricted capacity to infer new latent causes -- as in young animals or hippocampal-lesioned animals -- produces context-independence of extinction. Architecturally this maps to MECH-284 accumulator being unable to cross the threshold that would license inferring a new latent cause / new anchor.

mapping.source_claim_statement: Bayesian inference within an unbounded-latent-cause model accounts for context-dependent extinction phenomena, including renewal and latent inhibition. Contextual modulation arises because the observer infers different latent causes operating in different contexts; new contexts trigger inference of new causes rather than erasure of old learning. Hippocampal lesions or pre-developmental absence of the relevant inference produce context-independence.
mapping.ree_translation: This is the canonical computational frame for V_s invalidation. The latent-cause posterior over the current observation IS V_s for the currently anchored cause: high posterior = high V_s (anchor still fits); low posterior together with high posterior on a new cause = anchor invalidation event. MECH-284 accumulator is the Bayesian update integrating new observations into the posterior. MECH-269 anchor reset fires when the posterior crosses a threshold favouring a new cause. MECH-272 (state-gated routing) maps to whether the system commits to the current latent cause (anchor-dominant) or considers alternative causes (probe-dominant); the Gershman framework predicts the system should be in probe-dominant mode whenever the posterior is uncertain.
mapping.mapping_caveat: The framework is normative-computational; it does not specify which neural circuits implement which step. The OFC = state-label and DA = generalized-PE substrates from Wilson2014 / Gardner2018 are candidate implementations of the abstract Bayesian update. The hippocampal involvement in the original paper is consistent with our hippocampal-anchor framing.
mapping.source_context: Computational paper extending Redish et al 2007 with normative Bayesian inference; simulation results compared to behavioural data on renewal and latent inhibition in rodents and humans.

confidence_components.notes: Psych Review. The construct IS the V_s architecture. Mapping fidelity is the highest in the pull. Transfer low because the framework is computational and species-general.
